          Tether USDt USD Price (USDT-USD)

          1.0002 -0.0003 (-0.03%)

          4/15 6:36 PM
          USDT-USD
          Date 4/15 1:03 PM
          Close 1.0000

          Volume 0
          • Market Cap

            The total market value of a cryptocurrency’s circulating supply.

            Market Cap = Current Price × Circulating Supply

            185.496B
          • Fully Diluted Valuation

            Fully-diluted value (FDV) is an estimate of a cryptocurrency’s Market Cap if the maximum supply were in circulation.

            FDV = Current Price × Max Supply

            188.90B
          • Volume (24hr)

            The total value of a cryptocurrency traded across all exchanges in the past 24 hours. High volume suggests strong market activity and liquidity.

             111.47B
          • Previous Close 1.0003
          • Open 1.0003
          • Day's Range 0.9998 - 1.0004
          • 52 Week Range 0.9964 - 1.0075
          • Start Date 2015-02-25
          • Vol/Market cap (24hr)

            A ratio that indicates liquidity. Higher ratios suggest the asset is more actively traded and easier to buy/sell near its true value. Lower ratios may mean less liquidity and greater price volatility.

             60.09%
          • Circulating Supply

            The portion of total supply that is publicly available and actively circulating in the market.

             185.48B
          • Total Supply

            The number of tokens that currently exist, minus any coins that have been burned. This is similar to “shares outstanding” in equities.

             188.87B
          • Max Supply

            The maximum number of coins that could ever exist, based on the project’s code or rules.

            For some cryptocurrencies, this is a fixed number (e.g., Bitcoin’s 21M cap). For others, the supply may be unlimited or undefined, in which case max supply is shown as “∞”.

            --
          • All-time high 1.1059
          • All-time low 0.8995

          Data provided by Coinbase and CoinMarketCap.

          Tether USDt (USDT) is a cryptocurrency and operates on the Ethereum platform. Tether USDt has a current supply of 188,872,619,170.77503124 with 185,477,350,936.15456965 in circulation. The last known price of Tether USDt is 1.00006277 USD and is down -0.01 over the last 24 hours. It is currently trading on 177611 active market(s) with $129,531,259,045.61 traded over the last 24 hours. More information can be found at https://tether.to.
